notes: The roll-3d player bindings (R-SYS-007 / L-45). Action/context ids are L-33 stable intra-file ids (the id form is enforced inside a project dir; the standalone samples/input-bindings/ few-shot uses semantic ids). Human mapping: 25612509fa7530cb = move_x (x-axis roll force, keys A/D), 37ca9bc636e69ac2 = move_y (z-axis roll force, keys W/S), a8e9ae10fef110ab = ui_menu (Escape); context 8a804def3881cb2b = gameplay, 0a7ae9fb3d0dd76e = the modal pause menu that CAPTURES input while open. The routing front-end (src/packages/input/) applies the layered arbitration and feeds mapped actions into the sim InputState; the runtime mirror in src/tests/integration/games/ installs these same contexts and folds these same action ids.
